Offer Comparison

13 top opportunities (score ≥ 4.0)
Company Role Score Salary Remote Status Archetype
★ Legence Power BI Data Engineer 4.2/5 Not confirmed in posting. Market rate for Power BI Data Engineer / Senior BI Developer in Minneapolis: $95K–$130K. Blackstone-backed portfolio companies at this scale typically pay competitive corporate comp (not startup equity): $110K–$135K is realistic for a Power BI-focused technical role at this company size. Target $120K+ is achievable; confirm range in recruiter screen. — GO Senior Power BI Developer / BI Architect (Primary — Archetype 1)
C.H. Robinson Senior Business Intelligence Developer 4.5/5 Stated range: $77,000–$173,600. Effective realistic band for a Senior BI Developer with 10 years experience: $110,000–$140,000. The wide range is a grade band. The C.H. Robinson MSP market and Fortune 500 scale support $120K–$135K for a Sr. BI Developer at this experience level. — GO Senior Power BI Developer / BI Architect (Archetype 1)
D.A. Davidson Companies AI & Automation Engineer 4.2/5 $90,000–$120,000 stated in posting. Bottom of range ($90K) is below Matt's $100K minimum. Mid-band ($105K) and top ($120K) are within target. Role title and seniority are mid-level — the $120K ceiling is tight but reachable. Salary negotiation leverage depends on depth of AI/automation fit demonstrated. Target: negotiate to $110K–$120K. — GO AI Automation / Workflow Engineer (Archetype 5)
ME Global Inc. dba ME Elecmetal Business Intelligence Developer 4.1/5 Not confirmed from JD. Market rate for BI Developer (Power BI, SQL, manufacturing, MSP): $90K–$125K. "BI Developer" (non-Senior) at a company in the ME Global revenue band may band at $95K–$115K — below Matt's $120K target. "Senior BI Developer" or "Lead BI Developer" at the same company would band at $115K–$135K. **The title is the risk, not the fit.** Recruiter screen must confirm comp range reaches $120K+ before advancing to technical rounds. — GO Senior Power BI Developer / BI Architect (Primary)
Lunds & Byerlys Data Architect 4.0/5 $116,000–$185,000 stated in JD. Comfortably above the $100K minimum and $120K target. Midpoint $150K aligns with Matt's 10+ year experience and target range. Upper band ($185K) would be a stretch but the range confirms this role pays well above threshold — GO Operational Data Architect (Primary)
Mortenson Senior Finance BI Developer 4.5/5 Not stated in JD. Market rate for Senior Finance BI Developer in Minneapolis at a $7B+ construction firm: $110,000–$145,000. Mortenson is privately held (no public equity comp pressure) and known for strong total comp in the MSP market. Realistic range: $120K–$140K. Matt's target $120K+ is achievable at the midpoint; $130K+ is credible for a candidate with demonstrated finance BI depth. — Applied Senior Power BI Developer / BI Architect (Primary)
Protolabs Data Architect 4.4/5 Not stated in JD. Market for Data Architect at a publicly traded $500M manufacturing company, hybrid MSP: $125K–$165K. Protolabs Glassdoor data engineer/architect range cited at $115K–$155K. Matt's target ($120K–$160K) aligns well with the likely band. — In Progress Data Platform Architect (Archetype 1)
KinderCare Learning Companies Senior Power BI Developer / Microsoft Fabric Administrator 4.5/5 Not stated in JD. Market rate for Senior Power BI Developer + Fabric Admin dual role (remote, $2.7B company): $110,000–$140,000. KinderCare overall Glassdoor salary band ($33K–$95K) reflects frontline/center staff — corporate tech roles will be above this range. ZipRecruiter Senior Power BI Developer avg: ~$125K. Target: $120K–$135K. — Applied BI & Analytics Lead (Archetype 2)
Factspan Enterprise Data Architect 4.0/5 Not disclosed in JD Remote (Boston, MA listed — likely hybrid-eligible or client-site travel) Conditional GO Operational Data Architect (Archetype 1)
GSquared Group Senior Power BI Architect 4.0/5 Not disclosed Unknown (staffing firm — client engagement TBD) GO BI & Analytics Lead (Archetype 3)
Vultr Senior Business Intelligence Architect 4.0/5 $125,000–$150,000 (varies by location, experience, background, skills) — Applied BI & Analytics Lead (Archetype 3)
SysLogic Inc Data Analytics Architect 4.0/5 Not disclosed. Market for Data Analytics Architect at a small Microsoft consulting firm (42 employees, $10.6M revenue): $130K–$175K. Prefilter estimated $140K–$175K OTE. Small consultancy may structure as base + utilization bonus. Without stated range, comp risk is real — small IT shops often run $120K–$145K base. — SKIP Operational Data Architect (Archetype 1)
TechSoup Data Architect 4.5/5 20,000–25,000 PLN gross/month, adjusted by country cost-of-living index — SKIP Operational Data Architect (Nonprofit Global Platform)
